projects.name: Personal App Suite
projects.short: Self-hosted web apps tailored to me and made from scratch
projects.subtitle: homelab · 2024 – present
about: A cohesive set of self-hosted web applications running on a Mac Mini, all sharing a unified theme and served via Python HTTP servers managed by launchd on tailscale ports

A custom music server and streamer pointing at a local library, a TUI-style notes app built with Python and Textual that syncs to GitHub. A dashboard for all my servers and apps that is also a custom broswer startpage

projects.name: iPod 5.5 Generation
projects.subtitle: robotics · FRC Team 2130 Alpha · 2026 season
about: Ipods are so back and im here for all of it! This is a iPod 5.5 gen 30gb i got for a steal of $50. In the future I plan to do a case swap with a clear case, bluetooth mod so i can use my airpods and put in some more storage with a flash mod however with storage prices nowadays who knows when that will be!

experience.role: FRC Robotics Programmer And CAD Team
experience.desc: Lead programmer on a competitive FRC robotics team. Responsible for the full software stack on the 2026 season robot including swerve drive, autonomous path planning, and vision-based target tracking. Worked in a six-subsystem command-based architecture with WPILib Java, integrated PhotonVision across dual cameras, and built autonomous routines using PathPlannerLib. Also managed driver-station tooling via Smart Dashboard.

Operate live sound, lighting, and projection systems for performances and events. Responsible for pre-show setup, live mixing, and post-event teardown. Comfortable with both front-of-house and monitor mixing, and coordinating with production staff.
I have repaired many devices among members of the community including Android and Apple smartphones, Apple and Windows personal computers, and many others.

services.desc: Repair and upgrade devices including smartphones, laptops, desktops, audio systems, gaming consoles. Willing to assist setting up new technology and transfer data between devices. Will work on any brand or operating system. Price: Replacement Part Cost + $20 per hour
Will 3d print items 200mm x 200mm x 200mm or smaller. Limited to 10 items per order. Will 3d model basic items if needed. Price: $5 per item + $5 modeling fee.

Full production support for live events: front-of-house sound, monitor mixing, stage lighting, and projection. Experienced with setup, operation, and teardown for performances of varying scale. Must provide equipment (Mics, Sound Board, Speakers) Price: $60 Per Hour (Min 1)
